harvest_pin.via: idea-engine control/outbox.md @ HEAD 763b19e26d237f3d042a32ebf32f02bc297cd7c6 (PROPOSAL 042's verbatim harvest — the DOUBLE pin be6c75d via 763b19e)
harvest_pin.secondhand_status: SECONDHAND, disclosed — a direct venture-lab read was attempted exactly once at DRAFTING (not by this verdict session) and denied, verbatim: Access denied: repository "menno420/venture-lab" is not configured for this session. Allowed repositories: menno420/idea-engine, menno420/sim-lab — deny-wins, no retry. This verdict session attempted NO venture-lab read (hermetic by registration); every constant below is quoted from the P050 block / idea doc.

harvested_kill_clock_family.signal_window: the 30-day signal window ("the lane's own kill-rule window" per P042's harvest)
harvested_kill_clock_family.success_leg: the ≥1-organic-sale leg (the reads/inbound leg named out of scope by the harvest itself)

harvest_pin.note: citation only — the sim is fully hermetic: zero repo/network reads at verdict time; the runner reads ONLY this fixtures.json

model.time_unit: whole days; ONE experimental slot; all decision arithmetic exact fractions.Fraction
model.renewal_rule: policy KILL@T: launch; each live day is an independent Bernoulli(p) sale trial; first sale on day x ≤ T → GRADUATION (count 1, slot freed); zero sales through day T → KILL (count 0); either way B build days then a fresh prior draw; products still live at horizon end contribute nothing further
model.arm_A_recursion: G(h) = Σ_p π(p)·[ Σ_{x=1..min(T,h)} p(1−p)^{x−1}·(1 + G(h−x−B)) + 1{T<h}·(1−p)^T·G(h−T−B) ], G(h≤0) = 0; cell value G(H); every quantity exact
model.graduation_blocks_slot_world: sensitivity alternative (maintenance-drag reading, reporting-only): a GRADUATED product BLOCKS its slot for the rest of the horizon (count 1, no further launches in that slot); kills renew as in the main world

decision_rule.primary_metric: D(cell) = (max_T G(cell, T) − G(cell, 14)) / G(cell, 14), exact; dir(cell) ∈ {SHORTER (argmax T = 7), HELD (argmax T = 14, D = 0), LONGER (argmax T = 30)}; argmax ties resolved to 14 first (then to the earlier clock — a documented determinism choice, registration says 'ties to 14')
decision_rule.REJECT: checked FIRST: D(cell) ≥ 1/20 in ≥ 7 of 9 cells AND dir agreeing (all SHORTER or all LONGER) in every such over-margin cell
decision_rule.APPROVE: D(cell) < 1/20 in ≥ 7 of 9 cells AND in ≥ 2 of the 3 SKEPTIC cells, AND the seed-20261338 stability leg (20,000 trajectories, widened gate ≤ 3/50) reproduces the ruling through the twin independently-written evaluators
decision_rule.NULL: anything else — five pre-registered axes: (i) direction-straddle; (ii) build-cost-conditional; (iii) margin-thin under the sweep m ∈ {1/50, 1/10}; (iv) arm disagreement; (v) sensitivity straddle — reporting-only legs can NEVER flip the decision

arm_S.leg_order: pinned: cells in the pinned cell order, clocks in order (7, 14, 30) within a cell
arm_S.draw_order: pinned per trajectory: p from the cell prior (one uniform draw against the cumulative pmf), then daily sale trials day-by-day (each live day exactly one Bernoulli draw: random() < p) until graduation/kill/horizon, repeating across renewals
arm_S.headroom: ≥ 4·SE per leg asserted from the per-trajectory sample SD (pre-check 4·SE ≤ 3/200 per leg); any breach invalidates the run
arm_S.reporting_world_order: pinned: H = 60, H = 180, sensitivity grid P′ (at H = 90), graduation-blocks-slot (at H = 90) — 27 legs each in the pinned (cell, clock) order, one RNG
arm_S.aux_role: constructed in pinned order (fourth), RESERVED for the named NULL-probe bookkeeping, NEVER read by any decision number; draw-count sentinel asserts its exact draw count
arm_S.constructed_rngs: the four registered seeds are the ONLY RNGs constructed, in pinned order 20261337 → 20261338 → 20261339 → 20261340, strictly above the P049/V060 registry high-water 20261336
arm_S.sentinels: per leg: daily-trial draws ≡ recorded live days, p-draws ≡ recorded launches; per seed: total random() calls ≡ Σ(p-draws + daily-trial draws)

gates.F1: each of the three pmfs sums to 1 exactly (both grids)

F2.rule: point mass p = 0 ⇒ G = 0 exactly for every (T, B, H); point mass p = 1 (fixture constant, not on the grid) ⇒ G = ⌈H/(1+B)⌉ exactly

gates.F3: truncated-geometric identity Σ_{x=1..T} p(1−p)^{x−1} = 1 − (1−p)^T exactly for every grid p and clock T; per-launch graduation probability non-decreasing in T

F4.rule: hand world H = 6, B = 1, T = 2, point prior p = 1/2 ⇒ G = 31/16 exactly via the pinned hand chain

gates.F5: theorem gates, exact: (a) G non-increasing in B for every (prior, T); (b) the degenerate all-dead world (point mass 0) ⇒ G = 0 exactly with kills ≡ renewals (renewals = completed runs = graduations + kills; graduations = 0 there); (c) slot-day accounting identity graduation-days + kill-days + build-days + live-at-horizon-days = H exactly in Arm A's bookkeeping
gates.other: arm agreement gate; per-leg draw-count sentinels; twin independently-written decision evaluators (both must agree on the provisional class, the stability class, every margin-sweep class, and the final verdict); stdout + results.json byte-identical across two full process runs by external sha256 (no wall-clock/timestamps in any output); CPython minor version pinned below and asserted in the runner

reporting_only.note: Arm A exact re-evaluations + seed-20261339 Arm-S confirmations at 20,000 trajectories where MC is used — CANNOT flip the decision
reporting_only.outputs: full 9 × 3 G table with the D column and directions; expected kills / idle days / wasted graduations per cell; per-p conditional graduation split; H ∈ {60, 180}; sensitivity grid P′; graduation-blocks-slot world; margin sweep m ∈ {1/50, 1/10}
reporting_only.idle_days_definition: expected slot-days-idle = expected build-downtime days within the horizon, reported as the total with its post-kill / post-graduation split (the registration says 'expected slot-days-idle'; the split is a disclosed reporting refinement, not a registered constant)
reporting_only.wasted_graduations_definition: the wasted-graduation column per (cell, T) = graduations the shorter clock forfeits (idea doc's own gloss): at each KILL event of a product with true p, add 1 − (1−p)^(30−T) — the probability the killed product would have graduated had it run to the lane's own 30-day signal window; exactly 0 at T = 30 by construction. Expected live-at-horizon days are reported alongside (the censoring column). This definition is the one fixture-level disambiguation this session, disclosed here BEFORE the runner exists.
reporting_only.per_p_split_definition: per (cell, T): expected graduations and expected kills broken out by true p row (WHICH burners each clock saves or kills), exact

drafter_reference_never_gated.note: the drafter's DISCLOSED expected landing (P048/P049 closed-form-arm norm) — re-derived from scratch with ZERO trust, compared in REPORT.md, never gated
